svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="app.diagrams.net" agent="Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/146.0.0.0 Safari/537.36" version="29.6.6"> <diagram name="Page-1" id="gwyfPVto3OYyjQZAuqhD"> <mxGraphModel dx="872" dy="473" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="850" pageHeight="1100" background="none" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <UserObject label="" plantUmlData="{
 "data": "@startuml MovieTicketBooking_StateDiagram_Seat

' ===== STYLE =====
skinparam stateBackgroundColor #FFF3E0
skinparam stateBorderColor #E65100
skinparam stateArrowColor #333333
skinparam stateFontSize 14

title ShowSeat Status - State Diagram

[*] --> AVAILABLE : Show Created\n(Initialize Seats)

state AVAILABLE #90EE90 {
 state \"Can be selected\" as AS
 state \"Shown as GREEN\" as AG
}

AVAILABLE --> BLOCKED : createBooking()\n[Lock Acquired]

state BLOCKED #FFD700 {
 state \"Temporarily held\" as BH
 state \"Waiting for payment\" as BP
 state \"Shown as YELLOW\" as BY
}

BLOCKED --> BOOKED : confirmBooking()\n[Payment Success]
BLOCKED --> AVAILABLE : cancelBooking()
BLOCKED --> AVAILABLE : Booking Timeout\n(10 min expired)

state BOOKED #FF6B6B {
 state \"Permanently reserved\" as BR
 state \"Ticket generated\" as BT
 state \"Shown as RED\" as BRD
}

BOOKED --> AVAILABLE : cancelBooking()\n[Refund Initiated]

note right of AVAILABLE : Seat can be\nselected by users

note right of BLOCKED : Locked during\npayment window

note right of BOOKED : Cannot be\nselected anymore

@enduml

",
 "format": "svg"
}" id="6vH42XDeX_oHI80BPV8k-11"> <mxCell parent="1" style="shape=image;noLabel=1;verticalAlign=top;aspect=fixed;imageAspect=0;image=data:image/svg+xml,;" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="625" width="859" x="180" y="540" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </UserObject> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
